query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A child with long brown hair wearing dark clothing stands in a wood-paneled room with a hanging potted plant to the right. A light-colored pillow floats near her head, and she extends her right arm forward. In the lower left foreground, part of a dark bowling ball and a red object appear. Behind her, a recessed wall shelf holds stacked items, and magazines or papers lie on the floor near her feet.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A child with long brown hair wearing dark clothing stands in a wood-paneled room overwhelmed by a sickly orange-yellow color cast that shifts skin and surfaces toward an unhealthy, unsettling hue. A light-colored pillow floats near her head, and she extends her right arm forward. In the lower left foreground, part of a dark bowling ball and a red object appear with accidental obstructed cropping and casual framing typical of amateur snapshot energy. Behind her, a recessed wall shelf holds stacked items, and magazines or papers lie on the floor near her feet.
